nasb.text: and the Scripture was fulfilled which says, “And Abraham believed God, and it was reckoned to him as righteousness,” and he was called the friend of God.

esv.text: and the Scripture was fulfilled that says, “Abraham believed God, and it was counted to him as righteousness”—and he was called a friend of God.

cnv.text: 這正應驗了經上所說的：“亞伯拉罕信　神，這就算為他的義。”他也被稱為　神的朋友。

ccb.text: 这正应验了圣经的记载：“亚伯拉罕信上帝，就被算为义人”，并且被称为“上帝的朋友”。

csbs.text: 这就应验了经上所说的：“亚伯拉罕信神，这就被算为他的义。”他又被称为“神的朋友”。
